name: Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, difficulty in tracking sales commission data causes cash flow gaps. We automate data extraction and consolidation instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and consolidating sales commission data

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking and consolidating sales commission data
